text: cCcdit rowaer \iviain) £ General «2 Sharing & File Versioning Y Ignore Patterns 1 Advanced Folder Label Main Optional descriptive label for the folder. Can be different on each device. Folder ID default Required identifier for the folder. Must be the same on all cluster devices. C:\Users\Digit\Sync Path to the folder on the local computer. Will be created if it does not exist. The tilde character (~) can be used as a shortcut for c:\Users\pigit .
